emails.subject: FW: State Licensing/Utility Agreements
emails.body: FW: State Licensing/Utility Agreements Gloria Where are we on a matrix of Utility agreements? Jim To: Steffes, James D.; Hughes, Evan; Woodward, Jason; Kingerski, Harry; Ogenyi, Gloria; Shields, Craig; Wood, James M.

emails.subject: RE: State Licensing/Utility Agreements
emails.body: RE: State Licensing/Utility Agreements We have developed a matrix and are populating it. I should have something to you soon. Gloria To: Ogenyi, Gloria; Kingerski, Harry

emails.subject: RE: State Licensing/Utility Agreements
emails.body: I would like to take something to Dan Leff by end of business tomorrow. Whatever we have. Thanks, Jim To: Steffes, James D.; Kingerski, Harry
